execution_data.rendered_user_prompt:
You are an experienced HR recruiter. Analyze the following CV and job offer, then evaluate how well the candidate matches the position.

## Job Offer
<job_pages>

 • item #1:

# text_and_images

## text: ### text: DRY RUN: OCR text

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

 • item #2:

# text_and_images

## text: ### text: DRY RUN: OCR text

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

 • item #3:

# text_and_images

## text: ### text: DRY RUN: OCR text

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

 • item #4:

# text_and_images

## text: ### text: DRY RUN: OCR text

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

</job_pages>

## Candidate CV
<cv_pages>

 • item #1:

# text_and_images

## text: ### text: DRY RUN: OCR text

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

 • item #2:

# text_and_images

## text: ### text: DRY RUN: OCR text

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

 • item #3:

# text_and_images

## text: ### text: DRY RUN: OCR text

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

 • item #4:

# text_and_images

## text: ### text: DRY RUN: OCR text

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

</cv_pages>

## Instructions
- Extract the candidate name from the CV
- Assess whether the candidate is a good match (yes/no) based on required qualifications, experience, and skills
- Provide a match score from 0 to 100
- List key strengths relevant to the position
- List gaps or missing qualifications
- Write a concise overall summary of the evaluation

---
The instance we want to generate will be for the following class:
class CvEvaluation(StructuredContent):
    """Evaluation of a CV against a job offer"""
    candidate_name: str  # Name of the candidate
    match: Literal[
        "yes",
        "no",
    ]  # Whether the CV matches: yes or no
    match_score: float  # Match score from 0 to 100
    strengths: List[Any] | None = None  # Key strengths relative to the job
    gaps: List[Any] | None = None  # Missing qualifications relative to the job
    summary: str  # Overall evaluation summary

DO NOT create information.
If some information is not present for an attribute, output the default value or None according to the attribute definition.

execution_data.rendered_user_prompt:
You are an experienced HR recruiter. Analyze the following CV and job offer, then evaluate how well the candidate matches the position.

## Job Offer
<job_pages>

 • item #1:

# text_and_images

## text: ### text: DRY RUN: OCR text

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

 • item #2:

# text_and_images

## text: ### text: DRY RUN: OCR text

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

 • item #3:

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

 • item #4:

# text_and_images

## text: ### text: DRY RUN: OCR text

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

</job_pages>

## Candidate CV
<cv_pages>

 • item #1:

# text_and_images

## text: ### text: DRY RUN: OCR text

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

 • item #2:

# text_and_images

## text: ### text: DRY RUN: OCR text

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

 • item #3:

# text_and_images

## text: ### text: DRY RUN: OCR text

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

 • item #4:

# text_and_images

## text: ### text: DRY RUN: OCR text

## images: 

## raw_html: None

# page_view: None

</cv_pages>

## Instructions
- Extract the candidate name from the CV
- Assess whether the candidate is a good match (yes/no) based on required qualifications, experience, and skills
- Provide a match score from 0 to 100
- List key strengths relevant to the position
- List gaps or missing qualifications
- Write a concise overall summary of the evaluation

---
The instance we want to generate will be for the following class:
class CvEvaluation(StructuredContent):
    """Evaluation of a CV against a job offer"""
    candidate_name: str  # Name of the candidate
    match: Literal[
        "yes",
        "no",
    ]  # Whether the CV matches: yes or no
    match_score: float  # Match score from 0 to 100
    strengths: List[Any] | None = None  # Key strengths relative to the job
    gaps: List[Any] | None = None  # Missing qualifications relative to the job
    summary: str  # Overall evaluation summary

DO NOT create information.
If some information is not present for an attribute, output the default value or None according to the attribute definition.

concept.description: The content of a page of a document, comprising text and linked images and an optional page view image

cv_matching.screen_single_cv.description: Screen a single CV against a job offer

concept.description: The content of a page of a document, comprising text and linked images and an optional page view image

cv_matching.extract_cv_pages.description: Extract text pages from a CV document

concept.description: The content of a page of a document, comprising text and linked images and an optional page view image

cv_matching.evaluate_cv.description: Evaluate how well the CV matches the job offer requirements

concept.description: The content of a page of a document, comprising text and linked images and an optional page view image
The content of a page of a document, comprising text and linked images and an optional page view image
Evaluation of a CV against a job offer

prompt_blueprint.template:
You are an experienced HR recruiter. Analyze the following CV and job offer, then evaluate how well the candidate matches the position.

## Job Offer
@job_pages

## Candidate CV
@cv_pages

## Instructions
- Extract the candidate name from the CV
- Assess whether the candidate is a good match (yes/no) based on required qualifications, experience, and skills
- Provide a match score from 0 to 100
- List key strengths relevant to the position
- List gaps or missing qualifications
- Write a concise overall summary of the evaluation

cv_matching.route_by_match.description: Route based on whether the CV matches the job offer

concept.description: Evaluation of a CV against a job offer

cv_matching.generate_interview_questions.description: Generate tailored interview questions for a matching candidate

concept.description: Evaluation of a CV against a job offer
A tailored interview question for a candidate

prompt_blueprint.template:
Based on the following CV evaluation, generate exactly 5 tailored interview questions that:
- Probe the candidate's strengths to verify depth of expertise
- Explore the identified gaps to assess if they can be overcome
- Are specific to this candidate and role, not generic

## Evaluation
@evaluation

Generate 5 insightful, role-specific interview questions.

cv_matching.write_refusal_email.description: Write a professional refusal email for a non-matching candidate

concept.description: Evaluation of a CV against a job offer

cv_matching.write_refusal_email.template:
Dear {{ evaluation.candidate_name }},

Thank you for your interest in the position and for taking the time to submit your application.

After careful review, we regret to inform you that your profile does not fully align with the requirements for this role at this time.

{{ evaluation.summary }}

We encourage you to apply for future openings that may better match your qualifications.

Best regards,
HR Team
